properties.name: AM/NS Calvert
properties.notes: HSM cap 5,400kt. 3 HDGL lines (500+500+520kt). Former ThyssenKrupp plant.
properties.ownership_updated: Nippon Steel acquired AM share 2023. Now Nippon Steel / AM JV.

properties.name: Burns Harbor
properties.notes: Integrated BF/BOF. HSM 4,100kt. 110-in plate 330kt + 160-in plate 710kt. HDGL 550kt.

properties.name: Cleveland Works
properties.notes: Integrated. HSM 3,000kt. HDGL 650kt.

properties.name: Indiana Harbor East
properties.notes: Integrated BF/BOF + EAF (idle). HSM 4,900kt. Also IH West galv line (577kt GI/GA).

properties.name: Indiana Harbor West
properties.notes: Galv line at IH West complex. 577kt GI/GA.

properties.name: Riverdale (CSP)
properties.notes: Compact strip production (CSP) thin slab caster. 900kt.

properties.name: Columbus (Coatesville)
properties.notes: 140-in plate (500kt) + 206-in plate (50kt). EAF 798kt. Heavy/wide plate specialist.

properties.name: Conshohocken Plate
properties.notes: Steckel plate mill, 410kt. Discrete + coil plate.

properties.name: Gary Works
properties.notes: Largest US Steel plant. HSM 5,700kt. Gary Plate 580kt. Integrated BF/BOF.

properties.name: Granite City Works
properties.notes: Integrated. HSM 3,300kt. GGG galv 254kt. Near St. Louis on Mississippi.

properties.name: Great Lakes Works
properties.notes: HSM 3,800kt. CGL 472kt + EGL. BF idled 2020; hot strip idled. Some finishing active.
properties.ownership_updated: Hot strip/BF permanently idled 2020. Some finishing ops continue.

properties.name: Mon Valley Works — Irvin Plant
properties.notes: HSM 2,500kt (oldest continuous HSM in US, 1938). GAL1 200kt + GAL2 160kt.

properties.name: Mon Valley Works — Fairless Plant
properties.notes: GAL3 galvanizing 299kt. Finishing only (no steelmaking).

properties.name: Midwest Plant (Portage)
properties.notes: 72-in GACT 454kt + No.3 CL 245kt. Major galv hub near Burns Harbor.

properties.name: Fairfield Works
properties.notes: No.5 DualLine galv 272kt. EAF steelmaking resumed 2023-24.

properties.name: Big River Steel
properties.notes: BRS Phase 1: HSM ~1,500kt (AIST 2021), 2 EAF 2,900kt, HDGL 475kt. Flex mill.

properties.name: Big River Steel 2 (BR2)
properties.notes: BR2: $3.2B. Endless casting+rolling, 2 EAF, 2 coating lines (1 AHSS, 1 heavy gauge). Started 2024. Doubles USS EAF flat-rolled to 6M+ TPY.
properties.ownership_updated: Commissioned Oct 2024. Pickling line + TCM Nov 2024. CGL Jan 2025.

properties.name: PRO-TEC Coating
properties.notes: CGL1 635kt + CGL2 499kt + CGL3 454kt = 1,588kt total. Major auto-grade galvanizer.

properties.name: UPI (Pittsburg CA)
properties.notes: West Coast galvanizing. CGL 363kt.

properties.name: AK Steel — Butler Works
properties.notes: EAF 908kt, HSM 600kt. Specialty/electrical steel. Narrow strip.

properties.name: AK Steel — Mansfield Works
properties.notes: EAF melt shop + HSM 500kt. Narrow strip specialty.

properties.name: AK Steel — Middletown Works
properties.notes: Integrated BF/BOF. HSM 5,400kt (widest AK mill). EG 454kt + GI 508kt + AL 426kt.
properties.ownership_updated: Cliffs hydrogen injection trials on BF. Major decarbonization investment.

properties.name: AK Steel — Dearborn Works
properties.notes: Integrated BF/BOF + HDGL 454kt. Automotive-grade supplier to Detroit OEMs.

properties.name: AK Steel — Rockport Works
properties.notes: CGL 907kt — largest single galv line in Cliffs system. Wide strip (80-in).

properties.name: I/N Tek and I/N Kote
properties.notes: Cold rolling (I/N Tek) + galvanizing (I/N Kote). KCGL 454kt + EG 363kt. Auto-grade.

properties.name: Weirton
properties.notes: Wheeling-Nippon: AGL 375kt (GI/GA/GF/AL) + CGL 299kt (GI/AZ). Tin mill closed.

properties.name: Columbus (ArcelorMittal legacy)
properties.notes: HDGL 400kt. Finishing facility.

properties.name: Nucor Steel — Arkansas (Blytheville)
properties.notes: 2 EAF 2,450kt. HSM 2,300kt. GI 544kt + CAGL 455kt. Also Nucor-Yamato beam mill adjacent.

properties.name: Nucor Steel — Berkeley (Huger SC)
properties.notes: 2 EAF 2,956kt. HSM 2,300kt (7-stand, widest Nucor at 75-in). HDGL 635kt.

properties.name: Nucor Steel — Decatur (Trinity AL)
properties.notes: 2 DC-EAF 2,268kt. HSM 2,300kt (5+rougher). HDGL 544kt (wide, heavy-gauge capable to 6.3mm).

properties.name: Nucor Steel Gallatin (Ghent KY)
properties.notes: EAF 1,452kt. HSM 1,500kt (added roughing stands 2020). PAGL 454kt. On Ohio River.
properties.ownership_updated: 2020 added 2 roughing stands. Nucor-JFE galv JV also at Ghent.

properties.name: Nucor Steel — Indiana (Crawfordsville)
properties.notes: First Nucor thin-slab flat mill (1989). 2 EAF 2,304kt. HSM 1,900kt. GI 318kt. Narrower strip.

properties.name: Nucor Steel — Hertford County (Cofield NC)
properties.notes: EAF 1,542kt. 4-hi plate 1,000kt (wide: 125-in). Discrete plate. Near Norfolk/Hampton Roads.

properties.name: Nucor Steel Tuscaloosa
properties.notes: Steckel plate 1,090kt. EAF 1,200kt. Discrete + coil plate.

properties.name: Nucor Steel Longview
properties.notes: Heavy plate from ingot casting. 160kt. Niche heavy/wide plate.

properties.name: Nucor Steel West Virginia (Formerly CSI Flat Products)
properties.notes: $3.1B greenfield. 2 EAF + endless casting/rolling. 3M TPY capacity. Under construction 2024-2026. Nucor's largest single investment.
properties.ownership_updated: Construction ~40% complete as of Feb 2025. Commissioning target 2026.

properties.name: SDI — Butler (Flat Roll Div.)
properties.notes: 2 EAF 2,900kt. HSM 2,700kt (7-stand, thinnest at 1.09mm). 2 HDGL 544+327=871kt.

properties.name: SDI — Columbus (Flat Roll Div.)
properties.notes: 2 EAF 3,100kt. HSM 3,100kt (widest SDI at 76-in). 3 galv lines: GI/GA 408 + AZ 349 + AL 363 = 1,120kt.

properties.name: SDI — Sinton (Flat Roll Div.)
properties.notes: Greenfield 2021. 2 EAF + HSM ~3M TPY. CGL 500kt (GI/GA/AZ). Paint line. Near Corpus Christi port.

properties.name: SDI — Heartland (Terre Haute)
properties.notes: GI galvanizing 435kt. Flat roll finishing.

properties.name: SDI — Jeffersonville
properties.notes: Butler Div. satellite. GI/AZ 272kt. Near Louisville.

properties.name: SDI — GalvTech (Pittsburgh)
properties.notes: GI/GF 417kt. Pittsburgh finishing.

properties.name: SDI — MetalTech (Pittsburgh)
properties.notes: Heavy-gauge GI/GF 318kt.

properties.name: SDI — NexTech (Turtle Creek PA)
properties.notes: Narrow GI 154kt.

properties.name: NLMK Indiana
properties.notes: EAF 680kt. HSM 1,000kt (5-stand). Russian-owned (NLMK Group).

properties.name: NLMK Pennsylvania (Sharon Coating)
properties.notes: HSM 1,800kt. Sharon Coating: GI 250kt + GI/GA 454kt = 704kt.

properties.name: California Steel Industries
properties.notes: HSM 2,700kt (from imported slabs). 2 galv: 430 + 300 = 730kt. Only major flat-rolled in SoCal.

properties.name: North Star BlueScope Steel
properties.notes: EAF 1,905kt (largest single-furnace EAF in AIST 2021 data). HSM 2,700kt.

properties.name: JSW Steel USA — Mingo Junction
properties.notes: EAF 1,500kt (250mt heat, large). HSM 2,800kt. Indian-owned. On Ohio River.

properties.name: JSW Steel USA — Baytown Plate
properties.notes: 4-hi reversing plate 710kt. Wide heavy plate (152-in). Near Houston Ship Channel.

properties.name: ATI Specialty Rolled Products
properties.notes: Specialty/stainless hot rolling. 7-stand HSM (2014 new build). EAF 360kt.

properties.name: EVRAZ Portland
properties.notes: 2 Steckel plate mills 1,090kt. Widest plate in US West (138-in). Discrete + coil.
properties.ownership_updated: EVRAZ divested NA assets; now under new ownership structure.

properties.name: EVRAZ Rocky Mountain Steel
properties.notes: EAF 1,100kt. Rail and plate/structural. Colorado's only steel mill.

properties.name: SSAB Alabama (Axis)
properties.notes: EAF 1,270kt. Steckel plate 1,130kt. Discrete + coil. SSAB HardOx/Strenx specialty.

properties.name: SSAB Iowa (Muscatine)
properties.notes: EAF 1,194kt. Steckel plate 1,130kt. First SSAB Zero fossil-free steel shipped 2023.
properties.ownership_updated: AIST lists as Muscatine IA. Previously referenced as Montpelier (nearby).

properties.name: Outokumpu Stainless USA
properties.notes: Fully integrated stainless: EAF 1,000kt + hot rolling + cold finishing. Adjacent to AM/NS Calvert.

properties.name: North American Stainless (NAS)
properties.notes: Largest US stainless flat mill. 2 EAF 1,600kt combined. Hot+cold rolling. Acquired Haynes International 2024.

properties.name: Double G Coatings
properties.notes: GI/AZ 272kt. Finishing only.

properties.name: Gregory Industries
properties.notes: Narrow strip galvanizer 132kt.

properties.name: National Galvanizing
properties.notes: Heavy-gauge galvanizing 204kt (1.52-6.4mm).

properties.name: Spartan Steel Coating
properties.notes: Worthington/Cliffs JV. GI/GA 544kt. Auto-grade.

properties.name: Worthington Industries (Delta OH)
properties.notes: GI/GA 363kt. Adjacent to North Star BlueScope.
properties.ownership_updated: Worthington split into Worthington Enterprises + Worthington Steel 2023.

properties.name: Ternium USA (Shreveport)
properties.notes: GI/AZ 236kt + 2nd paint line (120kt, started ~2025). Latin American steel in US South.

properties.name: Steelscape — Kalama WA
properties.notes: West Coast galvanizer. GI 191kt. BlueScope subsidiary.

properties.name: Steelscape — Rancho Cucamonga CA
properties.notes: Galvalume (AZ) 200kt. SoCal.
properties.ownership_updated: CMC previously had a plant at this location (closed). BlueScope Steelscape separate.

properties.name: Algoma Steel
properties.notes: HSM 680kt strip + 410kt plate (combined mill). DSPC CSP line: 2,000kt. BF→EAF conversion underway.
properties.ownership_updated: CA$825-875M decarbonization: replacing BF/BOF with EAF. Target ~2025-2026.

properties.name: ArcelorMittal Dofasco
properties.notes: HSM 4,700kt. EAF 1,350kt. 6 galv lines totaling ~2,266kt (Hamilton + Côteau-du-Lac + Windsor).

properties.name: Stelco — Lake Erie Works
properties.notes: Integrated BF/BOF. HSM 2,300kt. Z-Line galv 454kt + Hamilton galv 181kt.
